title: Computer Science Fundamentals
description: The fundamentals of Computer Science are the backbone behind every successful Computer Scientist. Learning these concepts will help you develop a proper understanding of deeper concepts without getting lost in the abstract details. In this course you will learn the different layers that make up a Computer System from the Physical Level to the Application Level.
skills: Understand the different layers that make up a Computer System
Apply practical understanding of physical computer components
Understand the role of the operating system and system software
Identify the role of application software and its connection to the hardware
